Home.title: Sword Art Online
Home.aboutP1: Explore a living virtual world filled with monsters, mysteries, and thousands of other players. Create your hero, develop your skills, and forge your own path across a vast universe.
Home.aboutP2: Conquer dangerous dungeons, defeat powerful bosses, gather rare gear, and fight your way to the top of the global rankings!
Home.aboutP3: Level up anywhere and anytime, because this game works perfectly and looks great on both a computer and a mobile device! The hero explores the world and fights on his own, so the controls are very convenient even on a smartphone screen!
Home.f1Desc: Expansive regions, thousands of quests, and a branching storyline. Every choice shapes your hero's fate and creates a unique experience.
Home.f2Desc: Play anywhere - the project is perfectly optimized and looks equally good on a large PC screen and on a smartphone!
Home.f3Desc: Dynamic battles with convenient auto-combat. Increase power, change equipment, and use powerful skills even on the go!
Home.f4Desc: Recruit powerful allies, level up their abilities, and build unbeatable combat teams.
Home.f5Desc: Challenge incredibly strong opponents. Use tactics, smelting, and forging items to achieve victory!
Home.f6Desc: Create powerful guilds, team up with friends, and fight in arenas for the title of the strongest fighter on the server!
Home.footerCopy: Gaming Portal Sword Art Online LLC © 2026 – 2026
Home.entrySubtitle: Browser MMORPG - play right in your browser
Home.waitlistDesc: The game is still in development. Drop your email and we will be the first to let you know when servers go live.
Home.waitlistNote: No spam. Just one email: when we launch.
Home.waitlistSuccessMsg: We will email {email} as soon as servers open. Meanwhile, join our Discord and forum so you don't miss news.
